basics.name: Cédric Martin
basics.label: Fullstack Web Developer
basics.summary: Senior fullstack developer with 27+ years of experience across web, Android mobile, system administration and embedded systems. Equally at home on front end and back end, from e-commerce platforms to voice assistants, with a strong interest in reverse engineering, security, and build automation.

work.name: Groupe Open
work.summary: Various missions: Web applications, Android native and hybrid, NFV security, IoT/voice assistants.
highlights: Apr. 2026 - now: Senior Fullstack Developer for BRGM - Maintenance and enhancement of the Envinorma web platfrom
Mar. 2026 - May. 2026: Senior Front-end Developer for DIRE () - Refactoring/Improvement of the 'Synoptique' feature of the Sagacite web platform
Feb. 2026 - Feb. 2026: Senior Fullstack Developer for BRGM - Maintenance and enhancement of the Envinorma web platfrom
Jan. 2026 - Jan. 2026: Backup Senior Front-End Developer for BRGM - Redesign of Infoterre web platform
Sep. 2025 - Dec. 2025: Senior Fullstack Developer for Orange Labs - Realised a POC for an AI assistant for Orange employees.
Jan. 2025 - Aug. 2025: Senior Fullstack Developer for BRGM (French ministry of ecology transformation) - Maintenance and enhancement of the Envinorma web platfrom
Apr. 2024 - Dec. 2024: Senior Front-End Developer for SCHAPI (French ministry of ecology transformation) - Redesign of Schapi Superviseur app

Apr. 2021 - Mar. 2024: Android developer on the Decathlon Connect app (Java, Kotlin, RxJava, Bluetooth LE) - integration of new products, migration of legacy code to modern standards, build automation setup (Bitrise / GitHub Actions).

May 2020 - Mar. 2021: Security lead for the validation of an NFV TAS (Telephony Application Server) on Redhat OpenStack - built a Symfony app for security audit tracking and analysis, migrated fuzzing tools to a virtualised environment, validated hardening of 39 machines, CDR compliance, robustness testing (fuzzing), Linux CVE monitoring.

Nov. 2019 - Apr. 2020: POC for integrating a connected scale into the Decathlon Connect app - reverse-engineered the BLE communication protocol from a legacy app (My Geonaute) and wrote the specification.

Sep. 2018 - Oct. 2019: HomeIn research project at Orange Labs - Python/C++ integration of Orange solutions (TTS / ASR / speaker recognition), web configuration UI, 'Speakit' voice assistant on Raspberry Pi 3 (Snips), WakeWord evaluation test bench (Sensory / Fluent / SoundHound / Snips / Nuance).
Jun. 2018 - Aug. 2018: Urgonight Android app (Java) for Urgotech - reusable widgets, screen integration from mockups, Web/SVG animations in a WebView.
Dec. 2017 - May 2018: B2B marketplace for non-organic waste exchange for SUEZ Group - multilingual application stack (Symfony 3.4 / PHP 7), development environment (Vagrant), front-end development.
Aug. 2017 - Nov. 2017: Hybrid desktop/mobile order management app for Arcelor Mittal Construction - adaptive interfaces (desktop, Android, iOS), mobile build generation.
Jan. 2017 - Jul. 2017: B2B marketplace for organic waste exchange for SUEZ R&V - application stack (Symfony 3.2 / PHP 5), junior developer onboarding, front and back office development.

work.name: Ultra Mobile
highlights: Maintenance on existing sites (Drupal 7 / Acquia Lightning).
Implementation of new features and static pages.
R&D for upcoming company sites (Ultra Mobile, Mint Sim, Univision Mobile).

work.name: Defy Media
highlights: 2015-2016: LAMP team - maintenance, full redesign of thegloss.com on WordPress Multisite, porting an in-house WordPress page builder to WPMU, smoshcraft.net showcase site, multi-site Laravel platform POC consuming an existing API.
2013-2015: .NET team - responsive user interfaces for public sites and internal CMS tools, reusable web components built with React.js (Break, ScreenJunkies).

work.name: Designwelt Ltd (Avandeo)
highlights: Feature development for a design furniture e-shop (Drupal / Pressflow + Ubercart).
Front end: new features and UI optimisation; back end: tooling for product and management teams.
Built a sofa configurator letting customers choose their own details and options.

work.name: TMO Group
highlights: Group-buying/discount e-commerce platform and Shanghai merchant discovery magazine.
China-ready WordPress platform (localisation, payment methods), front and back-end modules and widgets.
Full Magento/WordPress integration, subscriber management, automated newsletter generation and delivery.
QR code coupon generation/activation platform and merchant-facing smartphone web app.

work.name: Nais Informatique & Telecom
highlights: 2011: Server-side JavaScript R&D (webble.it, Extract Widget) - REST API in Node.js, headless browser in JavaScript (jsdom/cssom), node-cookies NPM module, Bash scripts and daemons.
2010: blimpme.com - user management back office CMS and payment interface.
2010: Via'Agri - QtWebkit container app (C++/Qt), Google Maps API v2 to v3 migration, cellar plan interface.
2008-2009: Pratis Live V1 - Trident (IE) container app in Pascal/Delphi, JavaScript API for Vidal drug catalogue data, dosage/calendar/WYSIWYG widgets.
2006-2007: Creation and maintenance of various websites, user and client support.

work.name: SBA Consulting
highlights: Full redesign of tradefaireguide.com (UTF-8 migration, custom CMS development).

work.name: Lycee Kerraoul
highlights: User management, IT infrastructure administration, ICT training for students and teachers, computer club.
